# PHIL.165 ? Compete on Different Dimensions

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** competitive_strategy
**Subcategory:** compete_on_different_dimensions
**Domain:** COMPETITIVE_STRATEGY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Win by changing the game, not playing the same game better

## Application
Identify new value dimensions, shift basis of competition, make current game irrelevant
